raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The COVID-19 pandemic has caused socio-economic devastation throughout the Inland Empire.",
    "The Inland Empire Caucus is pursuing bipartisan solutions that will directly benefit residents.",
    "Only 11 of California's 58 counties have child/adolescent psychiatric hospital beds for children under age 12.",
    "There are fewer than 70 beds statewide for child/adolescent psychiatric services.",
    "AB 687 will facilitate the funding of housing projects to help address homelessness in Western Riverside County.",
    "The Cal Grant Reform Act enacts vast reforms to California's largest post-secondary financial aid program.",
    "SB 309 establishes a $200 million grant program aimed at ensuring more students complete the UC/CSU A-G course requirements.",
    "SB 601 increases the capital gains exclusion on homes sold to first-time buyers.",
    "SB 658 authorizes property tax deductions for disabled veterans proportional to their percentage disability rating from the VA."
  ]
}
```
